summary: Iter 72 Phase 2 (library_mode UX surfaces) end-to-end tested. Backend: 16/16 pytest passing (test_iter72_directory_mode_filter.py + test_iter71_library_mode.py — 6 + 10). Frontend: directory mode-filter chips, per-row badge, deep-link, 'Like me' chip all work; PublicLibraryView owner-mode badge correctly renders for fanfic ('💜 Fanfic reader') and original ('📖 Original-fic reader') owners, absent for mixed; fandom-chip strip is correctly hidden when the owner is original; Landing-page hero text varies by viewer's library_mode (fandom / author / shelf). AllBooksPage split-grid code is correctly wired (testids 'books-section-fanfic' / 'books-section-original') but only renders when the library has books — viewer's empty library means no visible sections were exercised; verified by code inspection at /app/frontend/src/pages/AllBooksPage.jsx:192-219.
critical_code_review_comments: AllBooksPage.jsx is 2282 lines — exceeds the 700-line guideline; consider splitting (not specific to iter72 but flagged for hygiene).

Phase-2 implementation is clean: mode-chip state lifted into URL searchParams (good for shareable links), per-row badge uses tiny chip styling that doesn't compete with the CTA, conditional fandom-strip avoids the 'empty strip = bug' trap. No code smells found in PublicLibraryView.jsx 270-385 or UsersDirectory.jsx 144-586.
Landing hero variants successfully diverge across the three modes — copy is distinct and on-brand.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on tested surfaces; AllBooksPage split-grid was code-reviewed only (cannot exercise without seeded books)

test_credentials: Tests use freshly registered users; no static creds needed.
seed_data_creation: Created ~7 ephemeral users with uuid-suffixed emails (pubfic*, pubog*, pubmix*, fic*, og*, mix*, viewer*). Backend pytest fixtures self-clean; FE-only viewer/public-library owners remain but won't collide.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 72 Phase 2 ships clean. AllBooksPage's mixed-mode split was not exercised live (empty library); to do so, seed a mixed-mode user with at least one Fanfiction-category and one non-fanfic book, visit /library, assert testids `books-section-fanfic` + `books-section-original` both render. Code at /app/frontend/src/pages/AllBooksPage.jsx:192-219 is correctly conditioned. Regression: `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iter71_library_mode.py /app/backend/tests/test_iter72_directory_mode_filter.py`.
